div.p: 1. Alignment & Padding Directory entries must be 4-byte aligned. The rec_len (Len) column reflects the distance to the next valid record, not just the name length.

ul.li: Scenario A (Slot Found) requires 2 writes: Data Block -> Inode.
Scenario B (Extend) requires 4 writes: Bitmap -> New Block -> Data Block -> Inode.
Failure after block_bitmap_alloc but before i_direct update causes a block leak (fsck required).

div.p: 3. Scanning Logic Pointer scan_ptr must handle the end-of-block boundary by checking i_size. If curr_offset + sizeof(dirent) > BLOCK_SIZE, the scan must transition to the next physical block via the i_direct mapping table.
